summary: Iteration 109: UI/UX improvements testing - Hotel Results (compact header, grid/list toggle, extended filters), Hotel Details (map with nearby services, policies toggle), Booking pages (navy headers), Travel Booking (improved trip summary, per passenger pricing). All features verified working.
critical_code_review_comments: HotelsResults.jsx: Compact search header with navy gradient (bg-gradient-to-r from-[#082c59] to-[#0a4a8f]) at line 720
HotelsResults.jsx: Grid/List view toggle buttons at lines 851-870
HotelsResults.jsx: Extended filters - Guest Rating (lines 946-962), Free Cancellation (lines 968-975), Breakfast Included (lines 976-983)
HotelDetails.jsx: Leaflet MapContainer with hotel marker at lines 821-834
HotelDetails.jsx: Nearby service filter buttons with data-testid at lines 873-896
HotelDetails.jsx: nearbyPins state and getServiceIcon function for colored markers at lines 616-625
HotelDetails.jsx: Policies toggle with data-testid='policies-toggle' at line 781
TravelBooking.jsx: Price Breakdown header with bg-[#082c59] at line 839
TravelBooking.jsx: Payment Method header with bg-[#082c59] at line 924
TravelBooking.jsx: Per passenger rate display when passengers > 1 at lines 851-854
context_for_next_testing_agent: UI/UX improvements fully verified. Hotel Results page has compact navy header, grid/list toggle, and extended filters (Guest Rating, Free Cancellation, Breakfast Included in filter sheet - may need to scroll to see all). Hotel Details has Leaflet map with nearby service filters (Restaurants, Car Rentals, Cinemas, Events) that show colored pins. Policies section shows check-in/out times by default with additional policies behind toggle. Booking pages use navy bg-[#082c59] for Price Breakdown and Payment Method headers. Travel Booking shows per passenger rate when 2+ passengers.

hotel_results_compact_header.details: Navy gradient header (bg-gradient-to-r from-[#082c59] to-[#0a4a8f]) with destination, dates, nights badge, guests count, and Edit button

hotel_results_grid_list_toggle.details: Grid and List view toggle buttons visible and functional

hotel_results_extended_filters.details: Filter sheet contains Guest Rating (Any, 7+, 8+, 8.5+, 9+), Free Cancellation checkbox, Breakfast Included checkbox in Deals & Policies section

hotel_details_map_with_marker.details: Leaflet MapContainer renders with hotel marker pin at hotel location

hotel_details_nearby_service_filters.details: Four filter buttons (Restaurants, Car Rentals, Cinemas, Events) with data-testid attributes

hotel_details_nearby_pins_on_map.details: Clicking service filter shows nearby pins with colored markers and 'Showing X near Y' text

hotel_details_policies_toggle.details: Check-in (14:00) and Check-out (12:00) visible by default, Additional Policies hidden behind toggle with data-testid='policies-toggle'

booking_pages_navy_headers.details: Price Breakdown and Payment Method headers use bg-[#082c59] navy background

travel_booking_trip_summary.details: Improved trip summary cards with route, date, time grid layout and bus icon in circle

travel_booking_per_passenger_rate.details: Shows 'X FCFA per passenger' when passengers.length > 1 (line 853)
